form.formComment: Last outing finished third of 7 starters at this track on April 1 over 3400m, 1.75 len behind Maple carrying 73.5kg at $9. The start before that; finished sixth of 15 runners at Doncaster on March 28 over 2000m, 5 len behind Mao Shang Wong carrying 53.5kg at $26. Might find this a bit too tough.

form.formComment: Last outing finished second of 8 runners at this track on March 19 over 3400m, 9 len behind Klitschko with 71.5kg at $12. The start before that; settled back and ran on when finished fifth of 10 starters at Wincanton on February 14 over 3000m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Caballero Cliff with 73kg at $51. Prefer others this time.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 48 days. Fresh up after three months fell at Newcastle on February 21 over 3400m. Previously second-up finished second of 8 runners at Uttoxeter on November 27 over 3200m, on slow going 1.3 len behind Soldier's Leap carrying 74.5kg at $8. Hard to fault on his best form.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 3 of 12 runners at Wetherby January 22 over 3200m, slow track; 36 len behind Starmount with 71kg at $51. Previously first up; 2 in a small field at this track October 19 over 3400m, 4.5 len behind Blue Topaz with 70.5kg at $3.50. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran last in a small field at this track on March 10 over 3300m, 30 len behind Tanking Along carrying 71kg at $11. Second-up won by 1.75 len this track on April 1 over 3300m defeating Natural Ability carrying 73.5kg at $6 in a steeplechase. Ideally placed to go back-to-back.

form.formComment: Racing well. Last outing finished third of 11 starters at Carlisle on March 22 over 3400m, 3.5 len behind National Question carrying 70kg at $5.50. The run before sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished third of 9 starters at Musselburgh on February 15 over 3100m, 17 len behind Sattam with 71kg at $6. Right in the mix if he is at his best.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last outing finished second of 7 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on March 31 over 3900m, 1.3 len behind Service Minimum carrying 65.5kg at $17. The start before that; didn't finish the race at this track on March 19 over 4000m. Ideally placed to go take this out.
